issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect for 'add it to the top of your Life cards face-down'. Should be AddLife (add card to life pile), not FlipLife (flip life total). FlipLife converts life cards to don or vice versa.

AttachDon action targets wrong scope. Text specifies 'give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your {Supernovas} type Leader' — must filter target by subType Supernovas and scope Leader only, not ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader.
Missing condition to restrict AttachDon to rested DON!! cards only. Should add condition HasRestingDon or similar to ensure only rested don are eligible.
